meta.title: 7-Minute IQ Test — Your Estimated IQ + Domain Strengths
meta.description: 30 psychometric-grade questions to estimate your IQ and analyze strengths across verbal, numerical, spatial, and logical reasoning. Free instant result, $7.50 for detailed PDF.

landing.headline:

In 7 minutes, get your estimated IQ and a 4-domain strength breakdown — free.
landing.disclaimer: Estimated score, not a clinical diagnosis.

variantB.headline:
Find your real IQ
in 30 questions
variantB.sub:
Free psychometric test.
Verbal · numerical · spatial · logical strengths — in 7 minutes.

faqs.a: Yes. Taking the 30 questions, getting your estimated IQ and top percentile — all free. Only the detailed PDF report (per-category scores, age-group comparison, all 30 explanations) is paid at $7.50.

It's an estimate that maps your correct-answer rate onto a normal distribution (mean 100, SD 15) — the same approach used in psychometrics. Not a clinical diagnosis; results can vary ±5–10 with mood and conditions.
Via Lemon Squeezy (global payment processor). Card, Apple Pay, KakaoPay, and more. Digital products are non-refundable once delivered.

faqs.q: When do I get the report?
faqs.a: Immediately after payment — the PDF is auto-emailed to the address you provide. If it hasn't arrived in 5 minutes, check your spam folder.
Your email is used only to deliver the report and is deleted after 90 days. Test responses are stored against anonymous session IDs and aren't linked to your identity.

faqs.q: Can I take the test more than once?
faqs.a: There's no hard limit, but for accuracy we recommend waiting 24 hours between attempts. Scores tend to cluster within a narrow band when conditions match.

faqs.q: Is the paid report a one-time purchase?
faqs.a: Yes — once paid, that session's result page stays unlocked forever. Bookmark the URL or save the emailed PDF for permanent access.

faqs.q: Do I need to register a business to accept payments?
faqs.a: Operator note — Lemon Squeezy is a Merchant of Record, so no business registration is required to launch. Tax/VAT handling is automatic.

faqs.q: Can I compare results with a friend?
faqs.a: Yes — after unlocking, the result page has a 'Create compare link' card. Paste your friend's session UUID and you'll get a side-by-side compare page.

faqs.q: Why can't I go back to previous questions?
faqs.a: We measure response time per question; allowing review would dilute the signal. A strict 60s-per-question flow matches the standard IQ assessment conditions.

test.introBody2: 60 seconds per question · about 7 minutes total
test.introBody3: One question at a time. You can't go back to previous questions.
test.leaveConfirm: Your test will be lost. Leave anyway?
test.noBack: You cannot return to previous questions.

result.disclaimer: Estimated score, not a medical diagnosis.
result.summaryHookHigh: Top-tier score. Your PDF report shows exactly which domains lift you above the average.
result.summaryHookMid: Balanced score around the average. Leveraging strengths and shoring up weaknesses moves the needle most.
result.summaryHookLow: This score doesn't show your full potential. Find your hidden strengths in the category breakdown.
result.signatureTitle: Your signature strength at a glance
result.signatureDominant: Your {cat} reasoning dominates the other three domains. The PDF maps this strength to careers and study paths.
result.signatureClear: You show a clear edge in {cat} reasoning. The PDF breaks down exact margins and how to leverage them.
result.signatureBalanced: A balanced four-domain profile. The PDF surfaces subtle leads and shoring-up tips you can't see here.
